name: Michael Che
bio: Michael Che is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and writer best known as co-anchor of Saturday Night Live's Weekend Update alongside Colin Jost since 2014, the segment's first African-American anchor. He and Jost served as SNL co-head writers from 2017 to 2022. His stand-up, often built around race, media, and current events, appears on the Netflix specials Michael Che Matters and Shame the Devil.

timeline.ev: Begins performing stand-up in New York
Joins Saturday Night Live as a writer
Becomes Weekend Update co-anchor with Colin Jost
Co-hosts the 70th Primetime Emmy Awards with Jost
Netflix special Shame the Devil; HBO Max series That Damn Michael Che

accolades: Emmy nominee and WGA Award winner for writing on Saturday Night Live
